name: TanStack Start
description: Full-stack React meta-framework with file-based routing, server functions, and TanStack Query integration.

drizzle-pg.description: Adds Drizzle ORM imports and schema references to server functions

drizzle-mysql.description: Adds Drizzle ORM (MySQL) imports and schema references to server functions

drizzle-sqlite.description: Adds Drizzle ORM (SQLite) imports and schema references to server functions

better-auth.description: Adds userId foreign key to schemas and injects auth guard into server functions

shadcn.description: Replaces raw HTML elements with shadcn/ui components in form and table generators

tailwindcss.description: Adds Tailwind utility classes to generated components
